title: Scouring Pads Heavy Duty Scourer Pad Green Scourers Non Scratch Abrasive Reusable Household Washing Up Dish Scrubber Sponges For Cleaning Kitchen Utensils Dishes Pots Pan Sink Scrub (Pack of 10)
features: GOOD QUALITY MATERIAL: Scouring Pads Are Made With Abrasive Materials Making Them Perfect For Those Tough And Stubborn Cleaning Tasks These Durable Scrubber Pads Have A Long Life And Are Designed To Withstand Heavy Duty Cleaning Whether It Is At Home Or In A Professional Kitchen Dish Scouring Pads Are Tough Enough For Both Commercial And Household Use

PACKAGE INCLUDES: This Package Provides You With A Pack Of 10 Scourers Green Scouring Pads Will Not Rust Or Splinter Like Steel Wool Reusable Scourer Pads Are An Essential Tool For Keeping Your Kitchen Sparkling Clean Washing Up Sponges Are Just What You Need For Abrasive Cleaning And Scrubbing

MULTIPURPOSE USAGE: Non Stick Scratch Kitchen Scourers Can Be Used In The Workplace In The Kitchen Bathroom Industrial Kitchen Restaurants Break Rooms Camping Or Even In The Office Household Scrubbers For Kitchen Are Perfect For All Purpose Cleaning You Can Use Them To Clean Pots Dishes Pans Ovens Sinks Oven Racks Baking Trays Tiles Bbq Grills Broilers Hard Wearing Bench Tops And Garage Surfaces

USEFUL SCOURING PADS: Cleaning Scourers Will Be Super Helpful For You Dish Scrub Pads Are Nice And Soft So You Will Not Have To Worry About Scratching Anything While You Clean Scourer Pads Are Built To Last So They Will Not Easily Tear Or Wear Out With Their Powerful Cleaning Effect You Will Have No Trouble Tackling Any Mess In The Kitchen

EASY TO CLEAN: Non Scratch Scouring Pads Are Super Easy To Clean Just Give Them A Good Rinse To Remove Any Dirt And Food Particles After That Simply Shake Off The Excess Water And Let Them Air Dry These Abrasive Scouring Pads Are Designed For Multiple Uses And Are Both Strong And Flexible Scrub Pads Can Easily Reach Tight Corners And Hard To Reach Areas
